subject: [PATCH v1 17/17] docs: fuse: document extended passthrough (FUSE_PASSTHROUGH_INO)

2026-04-22.patch_summary: This patch adds documentation to the Linux kernel's FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) passthrough feature, specifically extended passthrough mode (FUSE_PASSTHROUGH_INO). The new section explains how to enable and use this mode, which allows for one-to-one mapping of fuse inode numbers with backing file inode numbers. This enables passthrough for inode operations, directory operations, and kernel-initiated open requests.
